description: Java Spring Boot controller class defining REST API endpoints for managing loan application drafts, including creation, listing, retrieval, update, patching, readiness check, submission, decisioning, and deletion.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftController
classes.description: Spring REST controller handling endpoints for loan application draft operations.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new loan application draft for the authenticated user.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists all drafts belonging to the authenticated user, ordered by recent update.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a specific draft by ID if owned by the authenticated user.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Replaces the fields of an existing draft, optionally using optimistic concurrency control.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a section of the draft with provided JSON data; allows merging sections.

methods.name: readiness
methods.description: Checks if a draft is ready for submission based on section completion and document metadata.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits a draft if it meets all readiness criteria, locking it from further modification.

methods.name: decide
methods.description: Runs risk scoring and decisioning on a draft, computes risk score and decision, and persists the result.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a draft if owned by the user and not yet submitted.
